name: Blade
description: A fighter, guard, mercenary, knight, soldier, holy warrior, or weapon-master. A Blade may be brutal, noble, disciplined, spiritual, or sworn to a sacred cause.
gift_description: Once per fight, add +1d6 damage after hitting an enemy.

name: Shadow
description: A scout, thief, spy, hunter, smuggler, or tomb-breaker. A Shadow survives through silence, speed, awareness, and careful timing.
starting_gear: light weapon, tools, cloak, travel pack
gift_description: Add +2 when attacking an enemy that has not noticed you.

name: Sage
description: A scholar, healer, alchemist, engineer, advisor, or keeper of old knowledge. A Sage is not helpless in danger, but relies more on knowledge than brute force.
starting_gear: hand axe or short sword, books or tools, travel pack
armor_allowed: No armor or light armor only
gift_description: Once per scene, ask the Guide one useful question about history, monsters, magic, traps, machines, ruins, or strange objects.

name: Mystic
description: A spellcaster who studies grimoires, spirits, signs, forbidden words, and hidden forces. Mystics are powerful, but magic is never completely safe.
starting_gear: dagger or staff, grimoire, travel pack
